subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jaipur?
C_en: Cenotaph of Sawai Jai Singh II

question_en: Which monument is connected to the life of Pratap Singh Kaira?
question_hi: प्रतिका निर्गती का संबंधित हुए मौनिर्गती का प्रतिका

options_en.option_explain: It is a historical fort built by Pratap Singh Kaira.
A village named after Pratap Singh Kaira.
A fort built by Pratap Singh Kaira in the 18th century.
A historical fort located in Chittor
